ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow cycling through heading levels with commands
ast.target: 允许通过命令在标题级别间循环切换

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The minimum heading level for cycling operations
ast.target: 循环操作的最小标题级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum heading level for cycling operations
ast.target: 循环操作的最大标题级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display heading level indicators in the editor gutter
ast.target: 在编辑器装订线显示标题级别指示器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background color for the gutter badges
ast.target: 装订线徽章的背景颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text color for the gutter badges
ast.target: 装订线徽章的文本颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow operations to proceed even when hierarchy issues are detected
ast.target: 即使检测到层级问题也允许操作继续进行

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: The current selection contains both H1 and H2 headings. Promoting headings within this selection might affect overall document structure. Please review.
ast.target: 警告：当前选择同时包含 H1 和 H2 标题。在此选择内提升标题可能会影响整体文档结构。请检查。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot promote to H1: An H1 heading already existed within the original selection.
ast.target: 无法提升至 H1：原始选择中已存在 H1 标题。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: The selection now contains both H1 and H2 headings. This might affect document structure.
ast.target: 警告：选择现在同时包含 H1 和 H2 标题。这可能会影响文档结构。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: Selection now contains H5 and H6 headings, and "Wrap after H6" is disabled. This may lead to H6 dead-ends.
ast.target: 警告：选择现在包含 H5 和 H6 标题，且“H6 之后循环”已禁用。这可能导致 H6 死胡同。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure hotkeys for all commands in Obsidian's main settings under

ast.name: text
ast.target: ”下配置所有命令的快捷键（搜索“标题助手”）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click on gutter badges (if enabled) to change heading levels directly with your mouse.
ast.target: 点击装订线徽章（如果已启用）可直接用鼠标更改标题级别。
